title: Objective Definition Schema
description: Defines an optimization objective compatible with TVL 0.9 and SDK wire payloads. Specifies a metric to optimize, its orientation/direction, weight, normalization, and optional banding. Multi-objective normalization and aggregation behavior (zero-span fallback, weight rescaling, dominance guard) is specified separately in multi_objective_semantics_schema.json as a meta-contract; those constants are not wire-format fields.

ObjectiveDirection.description:
Optimization direction:
- maximize: Higher values are better
- minimize: Lower values are better
- band: Value should fall within a target range

NormalizationStrategy.description: Strategy used to normalize objective values before weighted aggregation.

name.description: Objective metric name (must match a measure name)

direction.description: Optimization direction for this objective. Kept as the TVL-compatible alias for orientation.

orientation.description: SDK wire-format optimization orientation for this objective.

weight.description: Relative weight of this objective in multi-objective optimization

normalization.description: Normalization strategy used before aggregating this objective

bounds.description: Optional [lower, upper] objective bounds used by SDK objective schemas

band.description: Target band specification (required when direction is 'band')

band_test.description: SDK wire-format statistical test for banded objectives

band_alpha.description: SDK wire-format significance level for banded objectives
